notes: Scope broadened to include ‘exhibits any object in any form’

ipcTitle: Defamation of a corporation
bnsTitle: Defamation
notes: IPC Section 510 (Defamation of a corporation) merged into BNS Section 356 (Defamation).

bnsTitle: Punishment for attempting to commit offences
notes: Section 62 of BNS corresponds to IPC section 511 on attempt.
